_spec: SPEC §6.2 — nutrient–drug / nutrient–condition screening that gates every supplement suggestion (§2.4).
_warning: ⚠️ VERIFY. Ships EMPTY and unverified. The illustrative categories in SPEC §6.2 (e.g. vitamin K with anticoagulants; iron with iron-overload; magnesium with advanced kidney disease; potassium with reduced kidney function/some BP meds; mineral–thyroid-med absorption timing) are PLACEHOLDERS A CLINICIAN/PHARMACIST MUST CONFIRM — not facts. While verified=false, the engine withholds ALL supplement suggestions (fail-safe).
_triggerIdReference: triggerId must be one of the canonical ids in packages/core/src/taxonomy.ts (MEDICATION_CLASSES / CONDITIONS). nutrient must be one of NUTRIENTS.

_exampleEntryShape.note: REPLACE — plain-language reason shown to the user / used by the explainer
_exampleEntryShape.sourceRef: REPLACE — citation to the clinician/pharmacist-reviewed source
_exampleEntryShape.reviewedBy: REPLACE — name + credential of the reviewer
